Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher's profile and associated data within the school system. Teacher login is managed by an administrator using an email and password.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the teacher.

lastName.description: The last name of the teacher.

email.description: The email address of the teacher, used for login and communication. (Managed by Admin, password handled by external auth system)

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the teacher.

address.description: The residential address of the teacher.

dateOfBirth.description: The date of birth of the teacher.

hireDate.description: The date when the teacher was hired by the school.

subjectIds.description: References to Subjects taught by this teacher. (Relationship: Teacher N:N Subject)

classIds.description: References to Classes where this teacher provides instruction. (Relationship: Teacher N:N Class)

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student's profile and academic information. Student's NIS and an associated password (managed by admin) are used by parents for login.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

nis.description: Nomor Induk Siswa (Student ID Number), a unique identifier for the student. This NIS, along with an admin-managed password, is used by parents for authentication.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

dateOfBirth.description: The date of birth of the student.

gender.description: The gender of the student (e.g., Male, Female, Other).

address.description: The residential address of the student.

noWa.description: The WhatsApp contact number of the student or their guardian.

enrollmentDate.description: The date when the student was enrolled in the school.

classId.description: Reference to the Class the student belongs to. (Relationship: Class 1:N Student)

parentIds.description: References to Parents/Guardians associated with this student. (Relationship: Student N:N Parent)

Parent.title: Parent
Parent.description: Represents a parent or guardian's profile associated with students. Parents log in using their child's NIS and an admin-provided password.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Parent entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the parent or guardian.

lastName.description: The last name of the parent or guardian.

email.description: The email address of the parent or guardian for communication purposes.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the parent or guardian.

address.description: The residential address of the parent or guardian.

relationshipToStudent.description: The relationship of the parent/guardian to the student (e.g., 'Mother', 'Father', 'Guardian').

studentIds.description: References to Students associated with this parent/guardian. (Relationship: Parent N:N Student)

Class.title: Class
Class.description: Represents a specific class or grade level within the school.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Class entity.

academicYear.description: The academic year this class belongs to (e.g., '2023-2024').

homeroomTeacherId.description: Reference to the homeroom teacher for this class. (Relationship: Teacher 1:N Class)

Subject.title: Subject
Subject.description: Represents an academic subject taught in the school.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Subject entity.

description.description: A brief description of the subject content.

Curriculum.title: Curriculum
Curriculum.description: Represents a single curriculum entry, associating a subject with a class level and a specific book.

id.description: Unique identifier for the curriculum entry.

subjectCode.description: The unique code for the subject.

subjectName.description: The name of the subject (Mata Pelajaran).

classLevel.description: The class level this curriculum applies to (e.g., 0, 1, 2, ... 6).

bookName.description: The name of the textbook or 'Kitab' used for this subject at this class level.

Alumni.title: Alumni
Alumni.description: Represents a former student who has graduated.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Alumni entity, same as original student ID.

nis.description: Nomor Induk Siswa (Student ID Number) of the alumni.

name.description: The full name of the alumni.

tahunLulus.description: The academic year the student graduated (e.g., '2023-2024').

address.description: The last known residential address of the alumni.

noWa.description: The last known WhatsApp number of the alumni.

reportUrl.description: URL to the student's final digital report card.

ScheduleEntry.title: Schedule Entry
ScheduleEntry.description: A single entry in a schedule, like a subject or a break.

subjectId.description: Reference to Subject, if type is 'subject'

teacherId.description: Reference to Teacher, if type is 'subject'

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.description: Represents the weekly schedule for a specific class, type (class/exam), and academic year.

TeacherAttendance.title: Teacher Attendance
TeacherAttendance.description: Represents a daily attendance record for a single teacher.

id.description: Unique identifier for the attendance record, typically a composite of teacherId and date.

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher this record belongs to.

teacherName.description: Denormalized teacher name for display purposes.

date.description: The date of the attendance record in YYYY-MM-DD format.

status.description: The attendance status for the day.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents an announcement created by an administrator for teachers and/or parents.

Grade.title: Grade
Grade.description: Represents a student's academic grade for a specific subject, type, and academic year.

params.name: adminUid
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the administrator.

params.name: teacherId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the teacher.

params.name: parentId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the parent.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique ID of the student.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique ID of the class.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique ID of the subject.

params.name: curriculumId
params.description: The unique ID of the curriculum entry.

params.name: alumniId
params.description: The unique ID of the alumni.

params.name: scheduleId
params.description: The unique ID of the schedule.

definition.description: Stores daily attendance records for teachers.

params.name: attendanceId
params.description: Composite unique ID for the attendance record.

params.name: gradeId
params.description: Composite unique ID for the grade record.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is extended to support grades, following the established path-based segregation principles. Grades are stored in a top-level collection for efficient querying across students and academic years.
